examples: Some pics from Typhoon Nock-Ten in RYW. Like a good NE swell of winter, but in the summer instead.
More difficult to tune. Most designs CANNOT adjust to flat, level nock travel in the vertical axis.
Any design changes and improvements are intended to improve the effectiveness of the use of Nock products.
Bello Nock has also put this own slant on New York City tourism.
Like his parents, Nock began circus training at 3 and performing at 11, a tradition he continued with his own children.
